0110110101010101 0110011101000000 0 -> sum: 1101010010010101, cout: 0
1000011100101011 1111011011101111 0 -> sum: 0111111000011010, cout: 1
0101100000100111 0010101010000001 0 -> sum: 1000001010101000, cout: 0
1111110101010110 0101110110011110 0 -> sum: 0101101011110100, cout: 1
1110110001011001 0001101000100110 0 -> sum: 0000011001111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000000 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
